Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Social Media: Older Adults (Flu) 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this social media carousel and sample messages to encourage older adults to take action to protect themselves from severe illness from respiratory viruses such as flu, COVID-19, and RSV.
Format: JPG Dimensions: 1080 x 1080 pixels Language: English (US) Size: 430 KB Length: Last updated: December 10, 2025
